## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the GrowthX engagement and conduct a deep discovery session.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Daylight's Pitch:** An AI-agentic platform paired with 15–25 year security experts (threat hunting, incident response) to reinvent cybersecurity services, which have seen minimal innovation in 20 years.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Primary Challenge:** The sales bottleneck is getting prospects to a POC. Daylight has a 100% close rate post-POC, but prospects hesitate due to startup size, scalability concerns, and skepticism about AI.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Build authority by targeting a specific audience with opinionated, conversational content. The initial focus is 70% on MDR (Managed Detection and Response) and 30% on future services to build a content backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=2963.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Role:** Execute an 8-week accelerated onboarding to become Daylight experts, build a content engine, and track AI visibility using a proprietary tool.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Stagnant Cybersecurity Services

  - [The $200B cybersecurity market has seen 20 years of innovation in tools, but services have been neglected due to low VC interest.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Recent AI funding (\>$1.5B in the last year) is now driving innovation in this space.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Daylight's model is a hybrid of an agentic platform and expert humans, contrasting with pure AI SOC tools that promise full automation.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

### The Solution: Daylight's Hybrid Model

  - [**Product:** A 24/7 MDR service, with new services launching quarterly (Threat Hunting, Managed Phishing, Managed DLP, Incident Response).](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [**Technology:** An agentic platform built for rapid integration.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
      - [**Integration Layer:** Built on founders' Torque experience; adds new integrations in days.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
      - [**Agentic Platform:** Uses multiple, specific AI agents managed by an orchestration system.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)
  - [**Human Element:** A global "follow the sun" team of experts (15–25 years experience) in complex tasks like threat hunting.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)

### The Challenge: Sales & Marketing Bottlenecks

  - [**ICP 1:** High-growth tech companies (\~1,000 people) needing 24/7 monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [**Trigger:** A board-level decision to address accountability gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [**ICP 2:** North American tech companies (4k–10k people) using expensive MDRs (Expel, ReliQuest) but are dissatisfied.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [**Trigger:** End of annual contract.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [**Sales Cycle:** \~3 months, with an Average Selling Price (ASP) of \~$120k.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [**POC:** A free 1-week trial is offered. The "aha moment" occurs post-POC, when skepticism about AI and startup size is overcome.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)

### The Strategy: Content & Growth

  - [**Content Goal:** Build authority with opinionated, conversational content that addresses real pain points, not just defines terms.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [**Initial Content Mix:** 70% MDR, 30% future services.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=2963.0)
  - [**Marketing Channels:**](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [**Events:** Focus on smaller, community-based events and Daylight's own "SOC Innovation Days" series.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [**Paid Search:** A future, highly focused effort targeting competitor keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
      - [**Partnerships:** Building relationships with two large companies.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [**Content Operations:**](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
      - [**Approvals:** Founder review is required for all calibration articles.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
      - [**Authorship:** Continue building expert author bios for all content.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
      - [**Engineering Blog:** A separate blog on AI engineering will run on the main domain.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=2558.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=2706.0)
      - [Conduct deep research on Daylight, its competitors, and the market.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=2706.0)
      - [Deliver initial artifacts (company, product, persona documents) by EOW to calibrate on messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=2706.0)
      - [Schedule a product deep-dive to understand the customer "aha moment."](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [**Daylight:**](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
      - [Provide examples of preferred content style.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
      - [Share paid search keywords once the campaign launches.](https://fathom.video/share/TJz5pxt5KUXojszxaE9sadnSaMV5JdsT?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
